text: Meet Argo. Turn a Playwright demo into a polished narrated video, with the editing and export tooling built in.

overlay.title: One demo. Full product story.
overlay.body: Narration, overlays, camera direction, preview, and export in one flow.

text: Start with argo init, or convert an existing spec with init dash dash from. Keep one unified scenes manifest for voiceover and overlays, and omit text when you want a silent video.

overlay.title: Playwright stays the source of truth.
overlay.body: Init, init-from, unified scenes, silent mode.

text: Seven T T S engines, local first. Iterate with Kokoro, bring a Hugging Face model, clone your own voice with M L X audio, or switch to hosted voices when it is time to ship.

overlay.text: Local-first voices, cloud voices, and voice clone

text: Preview turns the recorded pass into an edit bay. Scrub by scene, rewrite one line, regenerate only that scene, and export again without re-recording.

overlay.title: Edit the cut without throwing away the capture.
overlay.body: Scrub, regenerate, export, or re-record from one place.

text: Camera helpers keep feature beats readable. Spotlight, focus ring, dim around, zoom-to, cursor highlight, and confetti are all scriptable one-liners.

overlay.text: Direct the eye with code, not post-production guesswork.

text: Export does the finishing work. Transitions, speed ramp, subtitles, chapters, scene reports, and extra formats like square, vertical, and G I F all come from the same timeline.

overlay.title: More than an M P 4.
overlay.body: Transitions, speed ramp, subtitles, chapters, reports, and multi-format output.

text: As the demo catalog grows, validate catches wiring bugs, doctor checks the environment, pipeline dash dash all renders the fleet, and the dashboard gives you one place to inspect everything.
Under the hood, it is still just Playwright. A few helpers for narration, overlays, typing, and camera language turn test code into a maintainable demo.
That is the strategy. Keep one canonical showcase current, and the rest of the output stays in sync automatically.

overlay.title: One showcase. Many outputs.
overlay.body: Keep the story current once, then ship it everywhere.

text: And yes. This demo was recorded by Argo, cut into scenes by Argo, and exported by Argo.

overlay.text: Recorded by Argo. Recut by Argo. Shipped by Argo.
